_note: Per-page execution plan. refs = ledger keys (danaT2/T4/T6/T9, deedeeT3/T8, supraman, doomer, anchor, loc:<id>, prop:<id>). Tier-9 Dana pages attach anchor + no-downsize gate. prompt has NO dialogue/SFX/caption (L7). style prefix applied by loop.
style_prefix: Photorealistic 3D CGI render, DAZ Studio Iray style, photoreal CGI,
style_suffix: No text, no words, no speech bubbles, no logos. Photographic CGI render, NOT illustrated, NOT 2D, NOT cartoon.

pages.prompt: dramatic comic cover composite, medium eye-level shot in a futuristic training hall. Foreground: an exhausted male superhero in a torn royal-blue suit with a gold double-chevron emblem, slumped on one knee, drained. Behind him a colossally muscular black-bob woman in a blue super-suit with gold chevron and red cape rests one hand on his shoulder, smiling, towering. Back-right: a huge hyper-muscular blonde woman in a black corset and black-and-white striped thigh-high boots presses a massive black barbell overhead. Heroic dramatic lighting.

wide establishing shot inside a sinister concrete villain laboratory with a chrome ray-cannon rig overhead. A slim black-bob woman in a white blouse and charcoal pencil skirt is roped to a heavy bolted interrogation chair under the cannon barrel. In the foreground a bald man in a slate-grey suit gestures grandly; a blonde woman in a white lab coat stands at a glowing console in the back. Harsh overhead floodlights.

dramatic low-angle dutch shot, a male superhero in a pristine royal-blue suit with gold double-chevron emblem and red cape smashes fist-first THROUGH a concrete wall, debris exploding toward camera, cape snapping. Inside a dim concrete laboratory.

medium profile shot, depth-staged. A bald villain in a grey suit fires a chrome ray cannon; a male superhero in a blue chevron suit throws himself in front of a black-bob woman roped to a chair, a teal energy beam striking his back and refracting through his chest into her, both lit by the teal discharge. Concrete laboratory.

cowboy three-quarter shot, smoke clearing in a concrete laboratory. A male superhero in a scorched blue chevron suit kneels on one knee, steaming and drained; a black-bob woman in a white blouse is still roped to a chair behind him, dazed. Far background a sleek jet hatch is sealing.

tight medium-close-up, eye-level, asymmetric negative space. A beautiful black-bob woman with hazel eyes roped to a chair, flushed cheeks, wide eyes, breath caught, a faint teal shimmer crawling along her forearms under the ropes. Dim laboratory.

full-body low-angle front shot. A black-bob woman stands up THROUGH snapping ropes, her newly athletic muscular body (visible biceps and shoulders) filling and straining a white blouse, sleeves tight, the chair tipping behind her. A male superhero gapes in the background. Concrete laboratory.

a single image divided into three vertical panels side by side, the SAME right arm of a black-bob woman at three progressive stages of muscle growth, left to right: stage 1 a toned forearm-to-bicep flex inside a tightening white blouse sleeve; stage 2 the bicep ballooning, the shoulder seam splitting; stage 3 the arm fully swollen and athletic-hyper, the sleeve burst to threads, veins surfacing, sweat sheen. Same angle each panel, only the size increases.

a single image divided into three vertical panels side by side, the SAME midsection of a black-bob woman in profile at three progressive stages, left to right: stage 1 a white blouse taut over a soft waist; stage 2 fabric stretching as abdominal ridges press through; stage 3 the blouse hem parted to reveal carved eight-pack abs, skin glistening. Chest stays covered, midriff only. Same angle each panel.

medium over-shoulder shot. An athletic-muscular black-bob woman in a torn-but-covering white blouse flexes both arms in a power pose, rope shreds at her feet; a male superhero in a scorched blue chevron suit steps close, a hand on her shoulder, awe and worry on his face, their eyelines locked on a diagonal. Laboratory.

medium-close-up three-quarter shot, mid-embrace. An athletic-muscular black-bob woman's eyes fly wide open against a male superhero's cheek, a teal shimmer reigniting and crawling along her shoulders, stronger. Dim laboratory.

full-body worms-eye low shot, dynamic. A black-bob woman surges to a massive amazon muscle-goddess size, head thrown back, fists clenched, the white blouse and charcoal skirt seams splitting at shoulder and hip but still covering. A male superhero shields his face from flying buttons in the foreground. Laboratory.

a single image divided into three vertical panels side by side, the SAME chest and shoulders of a black-bob woman front-on at three progressive stages, left to right: stage 1 a white blouse straining, top button gone; stage 2 a swelling pec shelf, the placket gapping, fabric pulled silk-thin; stage 3 a knotted blouse remnant barely containing a massively expanded muscular chest and flared collarbone shelf, every seam blown but coverage fully intact. Same angle each panel, only size increases.

a single image divided into three vertical panels side by side, the SAME back of a black-bob woman at three progressive stages, left to right: stage 1 a white blouse back taut, shoulder blades defined; stage 2 lats flaring wide, the back seam splitting downward; stage 3 a full muscular cobra back exposed through the split, trapezius mountains, the blouse hanging on only as sleeves. Same angle each panel.

a single image divided into three vertical panels side by side, the SAME hip-to-calf of a black-bob woman in profile at three progressive stages, left to right: stage 1 a charcoal pencil skirt taut over toned thighs; stage 2 quad sweep and glutes stretching the skirt, the side slit tearing upward; stage 3 the skirt reduced to a secure wrap with huge sweeping quads and diamond calves exposed, heels snapped flat. Hips and glutes stay covered, slit shows thigh only. Same angle each panel.

medium-close-up eye-level shot. A massive amazon-muscular black-bob woman in torn-but-covering blouse remnants lifts a flustered male superhero's chin with one finger, leaning down into his space, heat and confidence between them. Laboratory.

cowboy low-angle shot framed past an out-of-focus door frame in the foreground. A massive muscular black-bob woman carries a male superhero bridal-style toward a steel-frame bed, his cape trailing, her silhouette rimmed in warm lamplight, both still in torn-but-covering remnants. Spartan concrete quarters at night.

wide establishing worms-eye shot at night of a brutalist concrete laboratory block, one top-floor window glowing warm, fresh cracks spidering across the facade, dust puffing from the roofline, a chunk of cornice dropping past a startled pigeon. Moonlit. No people.

medium high-angle shot, morning. A male superhero in a rumpled blue chevron suit with wrecked hair and one boot hobbles past glass suit-display cases using a steel locker for support; one display case holds an EMPTY hanger. Hall-of-justice locker room.

full-body low-angle front shot, morning reveal. A massive amazon-muscular black-bob woman wearing a male superhero's spare royal-blue suit stretched skin-tight with gold chevron and red cape presses a heavily loaded black barbell overhead, beaming; a glowing readout pillar reads MAX. A stunned male superhero's small face in the foreground doorway. Futuristic training hall.

medium-close-up three-quarter shot, side-by-side bicep comparison: a male superhero's earnest full flex versus a massive muscular black-bob woman's relaxed arm simply resting larger beside it. She grins down at him on a diagonal. Training hall.

medium over-shoulder shot in a backup laboratory with a wall of security monitors replaying a woman snapping ropes. A bald man in a grey suit watches; a blonde woman in a white lab coat leans at a workbench where a rebuilt chrome ray cannon prototype sits under a work lamp. Red accent lighting.

medium profile dutch shot. A blonde woman in a white lab coat stands square in a teal energy beam, coat whipping, arms spread, lit up; a bald man at a trigger console grins behind her. Backup laboratory, red lighting.

full-body worms-eye low shot, transformation. A blonde woman erupts to a massive hyper-muscular size, her white lab coat blasting off in shreds to reveal a black side-laced corset ensemble beneath, curly mane wild, fists up, nearby monitors cracking from her proximity. Backup laboratory.

a single image divided into three vertical panels side by side, the SAME shoulders and arms of a curly-blonde woman front-on at three progressive stages, left to right: stage 1 lab-coat sleeves tight over toned arms; stage 2 boulder shoulders splitting the sleeves at the seam; stage 3 bare hyper-muscular deltoids and biceps with shredded sleeve cuffs still ringing the wrists. Black corset beneath. Same angle each panel, only size increases.

a single image divided into three vertical panels side by side, the SAME thighs and striped thigh-high boots of a curly-blonde woman from a low behind angle at three progressive stages, left to right: stage 1 striped boots fitted over athletic legs; stage 2 quads and glutes swelling, boot shafts creaking; stage 3 hyper-muscular legs with the boot top seams burst, a black corset bottom holding full coverage, diamond calves. Same angle each panel.

medium dutch shot framed past a huge muscular forearm in the out-of-focus foreground as a hyper-muscular blonde woman in a black corset lifts a grey-suited bald man by his collar one-handed, his shoes off the floor, his silhouette going limp against the glowing monitor wall. Violence implied, not graphic. Backup laboratory.

medium eye-level shot, arm-wrestle across a steel table: a male superhero straining his whole body versus a massive muscular black-bob woman with her elbow planted casually, chin in her free hand, the tabletop crumpling under her grip. Training hall.

cowboy three-quarter shot. A male superhero deadlifts a loaded black barbell to his knees, shaking, the floor cracking; behind him a massive muscular black-bob woman holds an identical loaded barbell overhead one-handed while checking her nails on the other hand. Training hall.

medium three-quarter shot. A massive muscular black-bob woman wraps a male superhero in a gentle inescapable bear-hug from behind, his arms pinned, boots off the ground; he taps her forearm in surrender. Training hall.

wide worms-eye establishing shot, rampage. A hyper-muscular blonde woman in a black corset and striped thigh-high boots stands mid-avenue holding an overturned yellow taxi overhead one-handed (a wheel out of focus in the foreground), office glass raining around her, the street emptied of people with abandoned cars. Late afternoon.

cowboy high-angle shot. A male superhero lies flattened in a fresh asphalt crater, cape over his face; a hyper-muscular blonde woman in a black corset stands over him dusting her palms, one striped boot planted on his chest emblem. Downtown street.

cowboy dutch shot. A massive muscular black-bob woman in a blue chevron suit and cape descends from the sky fists-first between a hyper-muscular blonde corset villainess and a downed male superhero in a crater, her cape flaring, a landing crack radiating from her boots. The two huge women lock eyes. Downtown street.

medium dutch shot, brawl: a muscular black-bob woman in a blue chevron suit and a hyper-muscular blonde woman in a black corset mid-swing on a hard diagonal, fist meeting crossed guard, a shockwave ring blowing dust off the asphalt. Downtown street.

full birds-eye shot, a hyper-muscular blonde woman in a black corset dominates: one hand chokeslamming a muscular black-bob woman in a blue suit into the asphalt (a crater webbing out), the other backhanding a male superhero through a line of office windows, three storeys of glass detonating. Downtown street.

cowboy low-angle shot framed past a striped boot in the foreground pressing a male superhero's shoulders into rubble; behind, a muscular black-bob woman in a scuffed blue suit drags herself up the crater rim, eyes furious. Downtown street.

wide three-quarter establishing shot, a male superhero rockets away low over the rooftops, jaw set, torn cape snapping; behind him a hyper-muscular blonde woman in a black corset hammers a muscular black-bob woman through a brick storefront column. Downtown street, late afternoon.

medium profile shot, a male superhero braced on one knee with a chrome ray cannon shoulder-mounted, pouring its full teal charge into a kneeling muscular black-bob woman who is haloed in light; a hyper-muscular blonde corset villainess whirls in the background. Downtown street, late afternoon.

medium-close-up low-angle shot, a muscular black-bob woman rises inside a teal beam-glow, head back, teeth gritted in ecstatic strain, her blue suit seams beginning to lift off swelling growing shoulders, hair floating in the energy wash, becoming even more massive. Downtown street.

a single image divided into three vertical panels side by side, the SAME right arm of a black-bob woman mid-beam at three progressive stages, left to right: stage 1 a large bicep splitting a blue sleeve; stage 2 the sleeve gone and the bicep doubling, veins like cables, teal energy crackling on the skin; stage 3 an absolutely colossal hyper-muscular arm, the forearm thicker than her head, fist clenched, asphalt cracking under the static. Match the muscle volume of the attached reference. Same angle each panel, only size increases.

a single image divided into three vertical panels side by side, the SAME torso of a black-bob woman front-on at three progressive stages, left to right: stage 1 a gold double-chevron emblem stretching wide across a ballooning muscular chest; stage 2 the emblem distorted drum-tight, suit fibers tearing at the sternum, abs erupting below; stage 3 a colossal tier-9 torso with an enormous chest shelf and cobblestone abs, the gold chevron emblem heroically intact at the center of the strained blue suit. Coverage intact. Same angle each panel, only size increases.

a single image divided into three vertical panels side by side, the SAME back of a black-bob woman with cape mounts at three progressive stages, left to right: stage 1 lats flaring, cape clasps straining; stage 2 the back widening past the cape's hem, one clasp pinging off; stage 3 a colossal tier-9 cobra back eclipsing the sun, the cape re-hung off one heroic shoulder, the blue suit back panel split down the spine line with musculature visible and coverage maintained at the hips. Same angle each panel, only size increases.

full-body worms-eye shot, final reveal. A colossal tier-9 hyper-muscular black-bob woman in a strained blue chevron suit, now visibly LARGER than the hyper-muscular blonde corset villainess, catches the villainess's full-power haymaker in one open palm without sliding an inch, a shockwave ring around them; the villainess's face shows the first crack of fear. Downtown street.

full low-angle shot, the uppercut: a colossal tier-9 hyper-muscular black-bob woman's follow-through fills the lower-left third of the frame; a blonde corset villainess is a tiny flailing silhouette rocketing into the empty sky that dominates the rest, already past the tower tops. Downtown street.

medium-close-up three-quarter shot, sunset rim-light in settling dust. A colossal tier-9 hyper-muscular black-bob woman cradles a battered male superhero in both arms; he reaches up to touch her jaw, foreheads meeting, both smiling, his cape draped over her forearm. Downtown street.

cowboy low-angle shot framed past a young freckled photographer's raised flash camera in the foreground mid-flash. A colossal tier-9 hyper-muscular black-bob woman in a blue chevron suit and a male superhero pose together in settling dust, her arm around his shoulders, his hand proud on her forearm, both grinning at the lens. Sunset downtown street.
